title: salvia betonica
intro: Salvia betonica, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of wood betony include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Wood betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, and is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant properties.
intro_study: According to "Current drug metabolism", Salvia betonica benefits from its traditional uses in ethnomedicine and experimental studies which have corroborated extensive therapeutic efficacy.
